CustomField.description: Defines the AUM basis used in the fee calculation formula, as specified in the agreement. Determines whether month-end or daily average AUM figures are used.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Agreement formula basis: either Month-end AUM or Daily AUM.
CustomField.label: Calculation Frequency Basis

value.fullName: Liabilities - end of period and preceding end of period average
value.label: Liabilities - end of period and preceding end of period average

value.fullName: Certified holdings - end of period and preceding end of period average
value.label: Certified holdings - end of period and preceding end of period average

value.fullName: Commitments - end of period and preceding end of period average
value.label: Commitments - end of period and preceding end of period average
